allow: Bash(sed -i 's/Stagger\\.Item/StaggerItem/g' category-section.tsx instagram-section.tsx shipping-timeline.tsx testimonials.tsx why-choose-us.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/import { Stagger } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/import { Stagger, StaggerItem } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/' category-section.tsx instagram-section.tsx why-choose-us.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/import { Reveal, Stagger } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/import { Reveal, Stagger, StaggerItem } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/' shipping-timeline.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/import { Stagger, Reveal } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/import { Stagger, Reveal, StaggerItem } from "@\\/components\\/motion\\/reveal";/' testimonials.tsx)
